reason: Successfully verified that the agent can use the GitHub tool to identify the user and return their GitHub username after granting account access.
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with agent sidebar visible.
Step 2: Found and clicked the "QA-20260319-000742-0wlk" agent in the sidebar — Agent page loaded successfully showing the landing page with message input field.
Step 3: Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status was "idle", which is an acceptable status.
Step 4: Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message was successfully submitted and agent began processing.

Step 5: Account access request card appeared asking to grant GitHub account access — Card appeared with GitHub account already connected (marked "active"). I selected the GitHub checkbox to enable the Grant Access button.
Step 5 continued: Clicked "Grant Access (1)" button to grant GitHub account access — Access was granted and agent resumed processing.
Step 6: Waited up to 4 minutes for response — Agent completed processing in 37 seconds, returning a complete response.

Step 7: Verified response includes GitHub username — Response successfully returned "Your GitHub username is yiwi90. You have a GitHub Pro plan with 3 public repos and 12 private repos, and 2FA enabled." Screenshot shows the complete response with the GitHub username clearly visible.
